channel.title: Comics on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Comics on Arrans github.io

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: allaboutduncan/clu-comics
item.description: Digital comic curation app to read, manage, edit, and update libraries of any size.

item.title: kha-white/mokuro
item.description: Read Japanese manga inside browser with selectable text.

item.title: ef1500/libbbf
item.description: Bound Book Format: A high-performance container format for comics and manga

item.title: xthursdayx/yacreaderlibrary-server-docker
item.description: Docker image running a headless version of YACReaderLibraryServer 📦
